title: AI YouTube Is Only Claude Hype Now
summary: Cole Medin critiques the proliferation of duplicate Claude feature coverage on YouTube and announces a shift to building real systems live on stream using Claude Code and other coding agents. He will publish edited videos weekly on Wednesdays and host three live streams per week to demonstrate actual engineering work rather than react to announcements.
